title: NRMA Phillip Island Beachfront Holiday Park
Phillip Island Park Lane Holiday Park
description: Low-key cabins with kitchenettes, plus a playground, BBQ areas and an adjoining amusement park.
address: 1825 Phillip Island Rd, Cowes VIC 3922, Australia
hotelDescription:
Adjoining the A Maze 'N Things amusement park, these low-key cabins are 2.9 km from Smiths Beach and 3.3 km from Phillip Island Wildlife Park.
 The functional wood cabins offer kitchenettes and en suite bathrooms, as well as flat-screen TVs and Wi-Fi (fee). All have verandahs; family cabins add extra bedrooms with bunk beds.
 The grounds feature a playground, BBQ and picnic areas, and a wood-fired pizza oven, as well as a guest laundry (fee), and a game room with a pool table. The property also offers camping and caravan sites. Guests have discounted access to the adjoining amusement park.

title: BIG4 Ingenia Holidays Phillip Island
address: 24 Old Bridge Dr, Newhaven VIC 3925, Australia

title: Amaroo Park Phillip Island
description: Humble resort offering an outdoor pool, a shared kitchen & a BBQ area, plus a Korean restaurant.
hotelDescription:
Set 2 blocks from a main street lined with shops and eateries, this modest resort is 9 minutes' walk from Cowes Beach and 2 km from the C473 road.
 Unfussy rooms in a 1920s house provide Wi-Fi and private bathrooms, plus access to a shared kitchen and a living area. Suites in low-rise buildings feature en suite facilities, flat-screen TVs, sofas and/or decks. Cabins with kitchens sleep up to 4 guests.
 There's a Korean restaurant and a communal kitchen, as well as a saltwater outdoor pool, a sundeck, BBQ facilities and a game room. Limited parking is available, as are RV and camping sites. Children are welcome by prior arrangement.

title: San Remo Beachfront Caravan Park
address: 1 Davis Point Rd, San Remo VIC 3925, Australia

title: Seabreeze Haven Holiday House -Phillip Island -Pet Friendly
Kaloha Holiday Resort
description: Casual rooms, some with kitchenettes, plus a pool, an outdoor spa, a restaurant & a cocktail bar.
hotelDescription:
An 8-minute walk from Erehwon Point Beach, this informal hotel is also 6 km from the Koala Conservation Area and 7 km from Phillip Island Grand Prix Circuit.
 Offering free Wi-Fi, the straightforward rooms have flat-screen TVs, desks, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Some rooms also feature iPod docks, kitchenettes, whirlpool baths and balconies.
 There's a restaurant, a cocktail bar with a terrace, a saltwater pool and an outdoor spa. Other amenities include barbecues, a children's playground, gardens, free parking and laundry facilities (charge).
